actions.title: Try sleeping 30 minutes earlier a few days this week
Read something short about fertility — just to know your options
Consider booking a general health check (totally optional)
Notice how your energy shifts throughout the day
Drink one extra glass of water each day
Block 2 hours of focused time for something that matters to you
Reach out to one person in your field, just to say hi
Give yourself permission to delay one big decision this week
Check what health benefits your workplace actually offers
Say no to one thing that doesn't need to be a yes
Take one evening completely off — no obligations
Write down what felt heavy this week
Try a 5-minute reflection before you sleep
Do one thing that's just for fun, no productivity required
Spend time with someone who makes you feel good
